summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FitStart Phase 1 MVP. Backend authentication system and frontend UI components are working excellently. All critical user flows tested and passing.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 422 for missing authentication token
minor_issues.impact: Very minor - both status codes indicate authentication failure correctly

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
User registration with JWT token creation
Duplicate registration validation (400 error)
Password mismatch validation (400 error)
User login with JWT token return
Invalid login credentials blocking (401 error)
JWT token validation on /me endpoint
Landing page loads with all sections (Hero, How It Works, Programs, Testimonials, FAQ, Footer)
Navbar displays logo and navigation links correctly
Programs section shows 3 cards with correct pricing ($19, $39, $59)
Transformer program shows 'Most Popular' badge
FAQ accordion expand/collapse functionality
Login page navigation and form elements
Register page navigation and form elements
Register form validation and submission
Successful user registration redirects to home page
Login form integration with backend authentication
Invalid login shows proper error messages
Password visibility toggle functionality
Google OAuth buttons present (UI-only placeholders)
All program CTA buttons redirect to register page
Hero section View Programs button scrolls to programs section
Navbar navigation links scroll smoothly to sections
Frontend-backend integration working properly

success_percentage.backend: 89% (8/9 tests passed - minor status code difference)
success_percentage.overall: 95% (Excellent functionality with minor backend status code issue)
